title: Raytheon says it may not ship around 70 engines to Airbus in first quarter
text: Raytheon Technologies Corp said on Wednesday its Pratt and Whitney unit may not ship around 70 engines to Airbus SE in the first quarter of 2022 due to casting shortages.

title: Beijing places sanctions on U.S. arms companies Lockheed and Raytheon
text: China has placed U.S. companies Lockheed Martin Corp and Raytheon Technologies Corp under sanctions over U.S. arms sales to Taiwan.

title: Raytheon says it is a 'target' of a DOJ probe into industry hiring practices
text: Raytheon Technologies Corp said it is a target of a U.S. Department of Justice investigation into hiring practices in the aerospace industry, the U.S. aerospace and defense firm said in a filing on Friday.

title: Raytheon: Strong Q4 Finish, On Track To Deliver 2025 Targets
text: RTX stock reached a new post-pandemic high on Wednesday, but continues to represent a solid investment with good long-term growth. Q4 results showed that its aerospace segments continued to benefit from the recovery in air travel, while its defense segments stayed solid.
